step_by_step_thinking:
Spironolactone is used to treat symptoms related to excess androgens such as hirsutism by blocking their effects on target tissues. Tamoxifen can also reduce androgen levels indirectly through its anti-estrogenic properties but it has other indications unrelated to this patient's condition like breast cancer prevention or treatment. Oral Contraceptive Pills (OCPs) help regulate menstrual cycles which would benefit her infertility issue; they contain estrogen that counteracts some of the adverse effects caused by polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). Clomiphene Citrate stimulates ovulation making it beneficial for fertility issues associated with PCOS although there could potentially be side-effects including ovarian hyperstimulation syndrome if overused.

The drug option B - tamoxifen does not have direct benefits for managing PCOS-related symptoms compared to others listed here and may carry unnecessary risks without clear indication beyond potential off-label use scenarios specific to certain conditions outside what’s presented currently.
